title: [Lookup] Please confirm the total duration of Deliberately suspend st
description: Please confirm the total duration of Deliberately suspend strict metabolic dietary rules for Thanksgiving dinner to preserve marital harmony from 2025-11-27.

strict_inputs: Please confirm the total duration of Deliberately suspend strict metabolic dietary rules for Thanksgiving dinner to preserve marital harmony from 2025-11-27.

key_points: 事件: Deliberately suspend strict metabolic dietary rules for Thanksgiving dinner to preserve marital harmony

data_record.event_name: Deliberately suspend strict metabolic dietary rules for Thanksgiving dinner to preserve marital harmony
data_record.description: Recognizing that his mathematically rigid low-glycemic diet has increasingly strained shared dining experiences with his wife, he approaches the Thanksgiving holiday with calculated emotional intelligence. Operating as the family's stoic anchor, he intentionally bypasses his strict gram-level food weighing and allows himself to partake in traditional carbohydrate-heavy dishes. He methodically treats this 24-hour dietary relaxation as an isolated, controlled variable, logically accepting the inevitable temporary spike in his continuous glucose metrics as a necessary and acceptable systemic cost to prioritize his wife's emotional well-being during the holiday.

affected_indicators.influence_reasoning: High-carbohydrate traditional meal → massive postprandial glucose spike → mean daily glucose increases by 1.2 mmol/L.
Unregulated intake of simple and complex carbohydrates → sharp postprandial peaks and subsequent crashes → glucose variability increases by 6%.
Postprandial glucose excursions exceeding normal thresholds (7.8 mmol/L) → time in optimal range drops by 12%.
Late, heavy carbohydrate meal → delayed glucose clearance and hepatic glycogen saturation → the next morning's fasting glucose increases by 0.8 mmol/L.
Abandonment of strict sodium restriction for a holiday meal → acute vascular fluid retention → average systolic pressure rises by 6 mmHg.
Carbohydrate loading and sodium intake → every gram of glycogen stores ~3 grams of water → acute water retention increases scale weight by 0.6 kg.
Heavy digestive load and possible mild alcohol intake → sustained overnight metabolic and sympathetic activity → resting heart rate increases by 4 bpm.
Physiological stress from digesting a massive, atypical meal → transient withdrawal of parasympathetic tone → RMSSD drops by 4 ms.
Elevated overnight heart rate and metabolic digestive heat → compromised sleep architecture and physiological recharge → recovery score drops by 12.
Heavy evening meal → elevated core body temperature and active digestion → sleep latency increases by 10 minutes
High carbohydrate and sodium intake → gastrointestinal processing and mild fluid shifts → wake time after sleep onset increases by 15 minutes
Increased metabolic load during sleep → disrupted sleep continuity → number of awakenings increases by 1 count
Delayed sleep onset and increased nighttime awakenings → reduced overall sleep duration → total sleep time decreases by 25 minutes
More time spent awake in bed due to digestive burden → lower ratio of sleep to time in bed → sleep efficiency drops by 4%
Large meal and sodium intake → gastric distension and mild fluid retention → snoring index increases by 3 events/hour

data_record.trigger_reason: The exact calendar arrival of the Thanksgiving holiday intersecting with the ongoing marital strain caused by his strict Data-Driven Dietary Pivot, requiring a logical, one-day social compromise.
